headline: Marvell Technology (NASDAQ:MRVL) Surprises With Q4 Sales, Stock Soars
summary: Networking chips designer Marvell Technology (NASDAQ: MRVL) reported Q4 CY2025 results exceeding the market’s revenue expectations, with sales up 22.1% year on year to $2.22 billion. On top of that, next quarter’s revenue guidance ($2.4 billion at the midpoint) was surprisingly good and 5.2% above what analysts were expecting. Its non-GAAP profit of $0.80 per share was in line with analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: PayPal vs. Upstart: The fintech stock this VC is bullish on
summary: In the latest installment of Yahoo Finance's Good Buy or Goodbye, Infinity Ventures venture partner Kamran Ansari joins Josh Lipton to take a look at the fintech space and compare and explain why he is favoring PayPal (PYPL) while avoiding investing in Upstart (UPST). Ansari is also the founder and managing partner of Kapital Ventures. To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Market Domination.

headline: How The Investment Story For PayPal Holdings (PYPL) Is Shifting With Mixed Ratings And Deal Talk
summary: PayPal Holdings has seen its modeled fair value price target move from US$51.88 to US$52.03, a very small upward adjustment that still matters for anyone tracking the stock closely. This tweak comes as analysts debate whether repeated price target cuts and Neutral ratings outweigh arguments that the shares look undervalued, especially with reported takeover interest in the background. As you read on, you will see how to interpret these shifting targets and keep up with the evolving story...

headline: BofA sees card networks as safest bets, bullish on Visa & Mastercard
